prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial appears to be animated and uses a stylized, hand-drawn visual style.

At the opening frame, there is a close-up of an anthropomorphic brass instrument or brass-instrument-like figure. The figure has a human-like face with drooping eyes, a nose, and a moustache-like mouth area, while parts of tubing or horn mechanisms extend across and around the face. The background shows patterned wallpaper with repeated fleur-de-lis shapes. The image has muted yellow, green, and brown tones.

Near the end, the view changes to a wider shot. The same or a similar animated brass-instrument figure is shown seated on a chair in a room with the same patterned wallpaper. A large product or brand end card is overlaid in the center. The text reads “SUPERSCOPE” in large bold white letters inside a black, slightly curved horizontal panel, with “Listen to us.” in smaller white text underneath. The seated figure remains partly visible behind the text.

The final sampled frame is completely black, indicating a cut to black or the end of the commercial. No additional visual information is visible in that frame.
